sources.name: Federal Highway Administration — National Scenic Byways

itinerary.note: Junction toward GlennieRiver Road east Oscoda

paragraphs: The section of the byway that follows M-65 was first added to the state highway system in the mid-1930s. On December 20, 1988, the National Forest Service designated the River Road National Forest Scenic Byway in Iosco County. A second designation was added on September 22, 2005, when the Federal Highway Administration listed the roadway as the River Road National Scenic Byway.
